title: Chamaeraphis imberbis
taxonomy: Chamaeraphis imberbis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Chamaeraphis. The genus Chamaeraphis is further classified under the subfamily Scilloideae. This subfamily is part of the family Asparagaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Chamaeraphis imberbis is native to South Africa, where it grows in a variety of habitats.
